configure.observation: CMake configuration successful. ixland-libc: Building as monorepo subproject. All targets configured.

build.observation: Build completed successfully. All targets built: ixland-libc-core, ixland-libc-usersdb, ixland-libc-test, ixland-libc-usersdb-test, ixland-runtime, ixland-core, ixland-core-tests

test.observation: No CTest tests found (expected for this build configuration)

lint.observation: All linting checks passed. Warnings about missing tools (clang-tidy, swiftlint, shellcheck) but no actual lint errors.

format.observation: Formatting check completed. 21 files needed formatting but formatting was auto-fixed.

reviewDetails.summary: 17 public headers correctly located in ixland-libc/include/, 15 internal headers remain in ixland-system/, clean separation achieved, include guards present, CMake install() works

All three CMake targets correctly implemented: ixland-libc-headers (INTERFACE), ixland-libc-core (STATIC), ixland-libc-usersdb (STATIC). ixland-system properly consumes targets. No source file duplication.

All three core API functions implemented correctly: ixland_version() returns version string, ixland_strerror() converts error codes (fixed to use errno), ixland_perror() outputs to stderr. Thread-safe implementations. Comprehensive tests added.

Both standalone and monorepo build modes work correctly. Standalone mode auto-configures iOS settings. Monorepo mode uses parent settings. Both produce identical targets with identical symbol exports.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create a 'worker' skill for general implementation tasks. Features reference 'worker' skill but it doesn't exist in .factory/skills/. Workers adapt by doing manual verification but this is inconsistent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: libc-build-modes review noted worker referenced skill 'worker' which doesn't exist. Worker adapted with manual verification.

sharedStateObservations.observation: CMake target-based dependency pattern works well: ixland-system consumes ixland-libc-headers via target_link_libraries(ixland-core PUBLIC ixland-libc-headers), propagating include paths transitively.
CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR detection is the project's pattern for distinguishing standalone vs monorepo builds.
Relative path includes (../../../ixland-libc/include) were replaced with system-style includes (<linux/poll.h>) in commit 1dabb2f69 for clean separation.
ixland_strerror maps positive errno values (Linux convention) to negative ixland_error codes for compatibility.
Thread safety achieved through read-only data structures (static const arrays, constant string literals) rather than mutexes.
